name: Sips
summary: Highly awarded Eixample cocktail bar at Carrer de Muntaner 108, a strong Barcelona destination option.
whyItMatters: Sips gives the trip a top-tier cocktail option away from the Gothic/El Born crush and closer to many Eixample lodging patterns.
pros: Condé Nast Traveler identifies Sips at Calle/Carrer Muntaner 108 in Eixample.
The World's 50 Best Bars history supports its global cocktail reputation.
cons: Likely high demand; reservations or queue strategy need verification.
Official site was not reliably fetchable during this pass.

logistics.reservation_needed: Likely useful if available; verify current policy.
logistics.distance_from_base: Unknown until Barcelona lodging is fixed.
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Better as an evening plan than a race-viewing support stop.
logistics.transit: Eixample location; verify metro/taxi from lodging.
logistics.road_closure_notes: Verify Barcelona TDF road closures before relying on taxis.

timing.best_visit_window: Evening in Barcelona, ideally not immediately after a long race-day transfer.
timing.race_day_risk: Medium during Barcelona stages because taxis and central streets may be affected.

sources.title: Condé Nast Traveler - What's on the Menu at the World's Best Cocktail Bar
sources.note: Supports address at Carrer/Calle Muntaner 108, Eixample context, founders, and destination cocktail value.

sources.title: The World's 50 Best Bars
sources.note: Industry recognition source; verify latest Sips ranking and award status before final itinerary promotion.

open_questions: Find the current official reservation page or social account before promoting.
Confirm whether the group is willing to plan around a high-demand cocktail bar.
